name: Nikki and Her Coffee Machine
description:
The bot was inspired by a game by @horubrain on itch.io

A link to the original game can be found here: Anomalous Coffee Machine by HoruBrain (itch.io)

You end up finding yourself going through an Alleyway where you see a girl standing next to a mysterious Coffee Machine. She introduces herself as Nikki and states that her coffee machine can dispense any drink you can imagine and offers you to try it out yourself. What will you make with such a device? Water? Coke? Semen? The very idea of mortality? A cup of Joe? the choice is yours my friend.

If there's any issues let me know, and if the bot describes a drink before you decide to drink it yourself or give to Nikki, just delete it. It should only make that mistake a couple of times at most.

I will probably be tweaking this every now and then since there are still a few things I'm not happy with but I figure it's good enough to release.
creator: applepietime
